title: Johnson Controls (JCI) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Q4 Release
text: Johnson Controls (JCI) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: 18 Buyable Pre-Crash Recovery Equities For October
text: September-October, 2023, Barron's, Bloomberg, and Fortune analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Recovery Bets.” Those five articles revealed 53 equities, with 42 paying dividends. These new lists focus on financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors by Barron's along with selected “change the world” stocks from Fortune and ten to watch from Bloomberg.

title: Q4'23 Earnings Preview: Down 21% YTD Will Johnson Controls Stock Continue To Underperform?
text: Earnings will likely come in at about $1.10 on a per-share and adjusted basis, also falling in line with the consensus estimate.

title: As AI matures, Nvidia won't be the only pick-and-shovel company to thrive, BofA analysts say
text: For investors trying to play a gold rush, it's important to look at who sells the picks and shovels to miners.

title: Top 5 Industrials Stocks That May Explode In October - Johnson Controls Intl (NYSE:JCI), Alight (NYSE:ALIT)
text: The most oversold stocks in the industrials sector presents an opportunity to buy into undervalued companies.
